items.title: LIVE: China’s foreign ministry press conference
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Watch live as China’s Ministry of Foreign Affairs holds its daily press conference.

#china #live #politics #mofa</article>

items.title: Man found dead and lockdown lifted in Idaho after 2 firefighters killed in sniper ambush
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Authorities have lifted a lockdown order at the scene of a sniper ambush that killed two firefighters after they found the body of a man with a firearm nearby. Police say firefighters were ambushed by sniper fire while responding to a blaze in a northern Idaho mountain community.

#idaho #news 

Picture credit: Bill Buley/Coeur D'Alene Press

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.title: Some Palestinians in Gaza are skeptical about possibility of ceasefire deal
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Some Palestinians in Gaza, hardened by months of shattered promises and ongoing suffering, were skeptical on Sunday about the possibility of a ceasefire deal. (AP Video: Abdel Kareem Hana, production by Wafaa Shurafa)

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.title: Thousands rally in Georgia as government continues crackdown on political opponents
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Thousands of protesters gathered in front of the Georgian parliament on Sunday at the start of the seventh month of non-stop protests calling for new parliamentary elections.  (AP video shot by Sophiko Megrelidze)

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.title: Denmark expands military draft to women for first time
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>After almost four months of military training, newly conscripted women are completing the final exercises near the Danish Army’s barracks north of Copenhagen. (AP video shot by James Brooks)

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.title: Blue Origin's New Shepard completes 33rd mission to space
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Blue Origin's New Shepard successfully launched six people on a short trip into space and returned them back to Earth on Sunday morning. 

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.title: Street blockades set up in Serbia after arrests of anti-government protesters
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Thousands of people Sunday set up street blockades in Serbia, angry over the arrest of anti-government protesters who clashed with police at a massive rally a day earlier demanding early elections.  

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.title: LIVE: Pope Leo XIV holds Mass at the Vatican
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Watch live as Pope Leo XIV presides over a Mass for the Feast of Saints Peter and Paul and a blessing of the Sacred Pallium for the Metropolitan Archbishops. The pope will deliver his Sunday Angelus prayer and message following the Mass.

#pope #popeleoxiv #live</article>

items.title: LIVE: Senate reads full text of Trump's 'big, beautiful bill'
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Watch live as a full reading of the 940-page “One Big Beautiful Bill Act" — President Donald Trump's package of tax breaks and spending cuts — takes place in the Senate after Republicans narrowly cleared a key procedural step as they race to advance the legislation. Read more here: https://bit.ly/44CKrps

#senate #trump #live</article>

items.title: Iran’s judiciary says at least 71 killed in Israel’s attack on Tehran’s Evin prison
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>At least 71 people were killed in Israel’s attack on Tehran’s Evin prison, a notorious facility where many political prisoners and dissidents have been held, Iran’s judiciary said on Sunday. (AP video by Mohsen Ganji)


Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Dozens of pink river dolphins have been saved in Bolivia after become stranded a long way from the main waterway.

items.title: UK health secretary slams Bob Vylan's anti-Israel comments at Glastonbury
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>British police said they were examining videos of a band that led chants of “death to the IDF” or Israel Defense Forces at Saturday's Glastonbury Festival.

#glastonbury #israel #news

items.title: Rihanna hits the blue carpet for 'Smurfs' premiere in Brussels
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Rihanna was joined by A$AP Rocky at the world premiere of "Smurfs" in Brussels, Belgium Saturday. Rihanna produced the film and voices Smurfette in the animated reboot that takes the little creatures on a Smurfette-led rescue mission to save Papa Smurf. (June 28)

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​
